clusters.title: OpenAI Investor Calls for AI-Related Income Tax Reform
clusters.summary: An investor in OpenAI has proposed that the rise of artificial intelligence necessitates a comprehensive overhaul of income tax systems. The investor argues that current tax structures are inadequate to address the economic implications of AI advancements. This call for reform highlights the growing intersection of technology and fiscal policy as AI continues to reshape various industries.

clusters.title: Creating with Sora Safely
clusters.summary: To address the novel safety challenges posed by a state-of-the-art video model as well as a new social creation platform, we’ve built Sora 2 and the Sora app with safety at the foundation. Our approach is anchored in concrete protections.

clusters.title: Mistral AI Releases Voxtral TTS: A 4B Open-Weight Streaming Speech Model for Low-Latency Multilingual Voice Generation
clusters.summary: Mistral AI has released Voxtral TTS, an open-weight text-to-speech model that marks the company’s first major move into audio generation. Following the release of its transcription and language models, Mistral is now providing the final ‘output layer’ of the audio stack, positioning itself as a direct competitor to proprietary voice APIs in the developer ecosystem. […] The post Mistral AI Releases Voxtral TTS: A 4B Open-Weight Streaming Speech Model for Low-Latency Multilingual Voice Generation appeared first on MarkTechPost.
